subcodes.first_line: O esteemed brother! God willing, mayest thou be favoured through His grace and engaged in that which shall exalt His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: برادر مکرم انشاء الله بعنایه الله فائز باشی و بما یرتفع به الامر مشغول امر
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @service to others; to the Cause of God
